---
title: "Lesson 4: Bobbish in 4 Voices"
date: "2026-05-22"
order: 5
description: "Bobbish explained four ways — for a kindergartener, a high schooler, an undergrad, and as a PhD dissertation prospectus. Same designed register, four registers. Companion to the 20-slide deck."
categories: [bobble, bobbology, language, bobbish]
path: /bobbish-in-4-voices.html
---

```{=html}
<p>Redirecting to <a href="/bobbish-in-4-voices.html">the standalone page</a>… or jump to the <a href="/assets/bobbish.pdf">slide deck (PDF)</a>.</p>
<script>window.location.replace("/bobbish-in-4-voices.html");</script>
```
